channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: luongnv89 / claude-howto
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #1
A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
Language: Python 1,121 stars today

item.title: OpenBB-finance / OpenBB

Language: Python 113 stars today

item.title: thedotmack / claude-mem
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #7
A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.
Language: TypeScript 464 stars today

item.title: shareAI-lab / learn-claude-code
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10
Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1
Language: TypeScript 908 stars today

item.title: fastfetch-cli / fastfetch
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #11
A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.
Language: C 28 stars today

item.title: moeru-ai / airi
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #12
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
Language: TypeScript 213 stars today
